title: CPWN Pack
description: The original modpack for the CPWN server community, by Planet One.
body:
# Note as of June 2026
The CPWN Server has updated to 1.21.1, and this modpack has been superseded by the [CPWN Pack 2](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cpwn-2). I'll still keep this listing up so that you can revisit old builds if you want, but if you want to play on the server make sure you're using the new version!

# Original Description
The CPWN Pack is a modpack for the combined Planet One and Club Penguin Wiki Network community, specifically designed for server play on version 1.20.1. A mix of mods tailored to our specific tastes, engineered for fun.

This modpack contains all of the old favourites from our 1.16.5 pack, including:
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania)
- [Guns Without Roses](https://modrinth.com/mod/guns-without-roses)
- [Upgrade Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/upgrade-aquatic)
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
- [Aquaculture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)

...as well as some new content!

- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and its addons
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- and much more!

This modpack requires Java 17 and at least 4GB+ of RAM to play.
